description: Web AI Widget configuration for a business: persisted row fields plus merged config blob (sparse — omitted keys use product defaults). Returned inside `data.widget_configuration` (wrapped by standard Response) for authenticated CRUD/main APIs.

owner_id.description: Staff UID of the last editor (widget editor saves).

widget_title.description: Header title shown in the widget.

faq_and_guidance.description: FAQ and guidance text for the AI.

business_hours.description: Business hours text; null uses calendar default.

actions.description: Structured portal actions; order = array order.

items.description: A single client-portal action in the stored widget configuration. Order follows array position in the API.

uid.description: Portal action UID. Required by the API for persisted actions; nullable only for legacy/backfill reads.

label.description: Display label override; omit or null to resolve from portal defaults.

availability.description: Whether this action is available in the widget.

should_offer.description: Whether the assistant should proactively suggest this action.

when_to_offer.description: Guidance text for when the assistant should proactively suggest this action.

items.description: Quick-reply button shown under the welcome message in the Web AI Widget.

label.description: Button label shown to the visitor.

message.description: Message text sent to the assistant when the button is clicked.

lead_capture_text.description: Legacy global lead-capture copy. Kept for backward compatibility; intent-specific messaging should use `lead_intent_data[].lead_message_to_visitor`.

lead_intent_data.description: Intent-based lead capture configuration. The first/default intent is normalized to General inquiry by backend defaults.

items.description: Intent-based lead capture instructions used by the Web AI Widget assistant. Each item defines one intent and the data that should be collected for it.

lead_intent.description: Lead intent name (e.g., "General inquiry", "Book consultation"). Null/empty resolves to defaults according to backend normalization rules.

lead_data_items.description: Comma-separated or free-text list of lead fields to collect for this intent.

lead_message_to_visitor.description: Guidance text for how the assistant should explain what is being collected and what happens next while capturing lead details.

include_contact_info.description: Include contact info in AI context.

include_booking_policies.description: Include booking policies in AI context.

include_terms_of_service.description: Include terms of service in AI context.

guidance_urls.description: Extra URLs merged into AI guidance.

example.faq_and_guidance: Answer questions about pricing, emergency calls, and availability.
example.welcome_message: Hi! Need help with plumbing services?

actions.label: Book now
actions.when_to_offer: Offer when visitor asks for availability or scheduling.

welcome_buttons.label: Book an appointment
welcome_buttons.message: I want to book an appointment.

welcome_buttons.label: Emergency service
welcome_buttons.message: Do you provide emergency plumbing service?

example.lead_capture_text: Share your details and we will get back to you shortly.

lead_intent_data.lead_data_items: Full name, preferred date, phone number
lead_intent_data.lead_message_to_visitor: Please share your preferred date and contact number.
